game_info.title: Robot Arena - Clone Drone Combat
game_info.concept:
Clone Drone in the Danger Zone is a robot voxel slice-em-up where any part of your body can be sliced off. With your mind downloaded into a robot gladiator, you must survive the sinister trials of the arena.

🤖 CONGRATULATIONS HUMAN! 🤖


Apologies for the brief agony while we harvested your mind. But now your thought patterns are safely encased in this sleek, shiny robot!

WITH A LASER SWORD.

SURVIVE AND PERHAPS YOU WILL EARN UPGRADES.


GOOD LUCK IN THE ARENA.
We hope you survive longer than the last contestant...


Oh, and the one before that...

Singleplayer Game Modes

  • Story Mode - One part epic tale of human defiance, another part laser swords.
  • Endless Mode - Challenge yourself to fight through 86 level variants spread across 7 difficulty tiers. Can you make it to 🏆TITANIUM🏆 ?
  • Twitch Mode - TWITCH PLAYS YOU. Your Twitch stream viewers earn coins, bet on your gameplay and spawn enemies to kill you.
  • Challenge Mode - Bow-only, hammer-only, can you still survive the arena?

Multiplayer Game Modes

  • Last Bot Standing - A Battle-Royale-like game mode with short, 5-10 minute play sessions and up to 15 players. Survive, and shower in the remains of your fellow robot competitors.
  • Private Duels - Challenge your friend to a 1v1 duel!
  • Online Co-op! - Use the power of human friendship (and laser swords!) to survive in the arena!

Features (in the game right now!)

  • Epic Voxel Dismemberment: In addition to looking cool, the ability to cut off body parts is central to the gameplay. Jumping on one leg is a common occurrence. Large enemies need to be cut down to size before a fatal blow can be delivered.
  • Sharp Sword Combat: Combat is fast and intense, putting great emphasis on movement, timing and positioning. You are never safe, as any blow can instantly kill or dismember.
  • Entertaining Commentary: Commentatron and Analysis-Bot provide a play-by-play of your performance and react to your activities.
  • Upgrade your robot: jetpack, bow, kicking, deflection, clones, armor, FIRE BREATH 🔥🔥🔥.
  • Terrifying robotic enemies that actually get pretty hard! Sword robots, bow robots, Spidertron 5000, Spidertron 6000, gigantic hammer bots. So many things to dismember.
  • Level Editor: Make custom levels and challenges and share them with other humans! Explore the rich Workshop library of awesome human-built levels!
  • Achievements! Unlock upgrades, emotes and multiplayer skins by achieving a rich variety of things!
  • Emotes! Do the Funky Pillar Dance, mock your foes, or flap your arms delightfully!
game_info.description: You are a robot gladiator in a deadly arena. Survive waves of enemy robots by slicing them apart with your laser sword. Any part of your body can be severed - lose too many parts and you're destroyed! Dodge enemy attacks, cut them down piece by piece, and survive as long as possible. Collect power-ups dropped by defeated enemies to enhance your abilities.
game_info.controls:
Arrow Keys: Move your robot in four directions
Space: Swing your laser sword to attack
Shift: Dash quickly in your movement direction
Z: Block incoming attacks (reduces damage)
ENTER: Start game from title screen
ESC: Pause/Unpause game
R: Restart game after game over

TEST_1.test_description: Testing basic movement and sword combat mechanics. Verify the player can move in all directions, swing the sword, and make contact with enemies. Ensure enemies spawn correctly and take damage from sword strikes.
TEST_1.strategy_description: Move randomly in all directions while continuously swinging the sword. Approach any enemies that spawn and attempt to strike them. Test all four movement directions and sword attack patterns.
TEST_1.expected_outcome: Player should move smoothly in all directions, sword should swing with visible arc, and enemies should take damage and potentially lose body parts when hit. Test is successful if combat engagement occurs within 30 seconds and at least one enemy is damaged.

TEST_2.test_description: Testing advanced combat tactics and survival strategy. Focus on defeating enemies efficiently by targeting their vulnerable parts, using dash to evade attacks, and collecting power-ups. Verify the player can survive multiple waves.
TEST_2.strategy_description: Actively seek out nearest enemy, approach carefully, attack with sword focusing on body parts, use dash to dodge counterattacks. Collect any power-ups that drop. Prioritize survival by maintaining distance when health is low.
TEST_2.expected_outcome: Player should defeat at least 3 enemies, collect at least 1 power-up, and survive for at least 45 seconds. Test is successful when the player demonstrates effective combat and evasion tactics resulting in sustained survival.

TEST_3.test_description: Testing damage and dismemberment system. Verify that both player and enemies can lose body parts when damaged. Test that losing critical parts affects mobility and that complete destruction leads to death.
TEST_3.strategy_description: Engage in prolonged combat without blocking. Allow enemies to hit the player to test damage system. Continue fighting even after taking damage to see how dismemberment affects gameplay.
TEST_3.expected_outcome: Both player and enemies should visibly lose body parts when damaged. Player mobility should be affected by part loss (e.g., slower movement if leg is damaged). Test succeeds when dismemberment occurs and affects gameplay within 60 seconds.
TEST_3.description: Testing damage and dismemberment system. Verify that both player and enemies can lose body parts when damaged. Test that losing critical parts affects mobility and that complete destruction leads to death.
TEST_3.strategy: Engage in prolonged combat without blocking. Allow enemies to hit the player to test damage system. Continue fighting even after taking damage to see how dismemberment affects gameplay.
TEST_3.expected: Both player and enemies should visibly lose body parts when damaged. Player mobility should be affected by part loss (e.g., slower movement if leg is damaged). Test succeeds when dismemberment occurs and affects gameplay within 60 seconds.

TEST_4.test_description: Testing blocking and defensive mechanics. Verify that the block action reduces incoming damage and that timing is important for effective defense. Test stamina or cooldown systems if implemented.
TEST_4.strategy_description: Approach enemies and hold the block key when they attack. Test blocking against different enemy types. Alternate between blocking and attacking to find effective defensive patterns.
TEST_4.expected_outcome: Blocking should visibly reduce damage from enemy attacks. Player should survive longer when actively blocking compared to not blocking. Test succeeds when blocking demonstrably reduces damage by at least 50% within multiple combat encounters.
TEST_4.description: Testing blocking and defensive mechanics. Verify that the block action reduces incoming damage and that timing is important for effective defense. Test stamina or cooldown systems if implemented.
TEST_4.strategy: Approach enemies and hold the block key when they attack. Test blocking against different enemy types. Alternate between blocking and attacking to find effective defensive patterns.
TEST_4.expected: Blocking should visibly reduce damage from enemy attacks. Player should survive longer when actively blocking compared to not blocking. Test succeeds when blocking demonstrably reduces damage by at least 50% within multiple combat encounters.

TEST_5.test_description: Testing dash mechanic and mobility options. Verify that dash provides quick movement for dodging attacks and repositioning. Test cooldown system and dash effectiveness in combat situations.
TEST_5.strategy_description: Use dash frequently to move around the arena. Dash away from enemies when they attack. Dash toward enemies to close distance quickly. Test dash in all movement directions.
TEST_5.expected_outcome: Dash should provide noticeably faster movement with visual feedback. Should be useful for both evasion and engagement. Test succeeds when dash allows player to avoid at least 3 enemy attacks that would have otherwise hit.
TEST_5.description: Testing dash mechanic and mobility options. Verify that dash provides quick movement for dodging attacks and repositioning. Test cooldown system and dash effectiveness in combat situations.

TEST_6.test_description: Testing power-up collection and effects. Verify that power-ups spawn when enemies are defeated, can be collected by the player, and provide meaningful gameplay benefits.
TEST_6.strategy_description: Focus on defeating enemies and immediately collecting any power-ups that drop. Test different power-up types if multiple exist. Observe stat changes or ability enhancements after collection.
TEST_6.expected_outcome: Power-ups should spawn with visual distinction, be collectable, and provide clear benefits (health restoration, damage boost, speed increase, etc.). Test succeeds when at least 2 different power-ups are collected and their effects are observable.

TEST_7.test_description: Testing wave progression and difficulty scaling. Verify that enemy waves increase in difficulty with more enemies, stronger enemies, or new enemy types. Test that the game becomes progressively challenging.
TEST_7.strategy_description: Survive as long as possible using optimal combat tactics. Defeat all enemies in each wave efficiently. Observe changes in enemy behavior, numbers, and types as waves progress.
TEST_7.expected_outcome: Later waves should be noticeably more difficult than early waves. Enemy count or strength should increase. Test succeeds when player survives at least 3 complete waves and experiences clear difficulty escalation.
TEST_7.description: Testing wave progression and difficulty scaling. Verify that enemy waves increase in difficulty with more enemies, stronger enemies, or new enemy types. Test that the game becomes progressively challenging.
